summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Egypt are normally handled under international dangerous-goods transport rules. The UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3, is the baseline transport test evidence for lithium cells and batteries; carriers and forwarders may also require test summaries, SDS, packing instructions, state-of-charge controls, and marks / labels.
summary.zh: 运往埃及的锂电芯和电池通常按国际危险货物运输规则处理。联合国《试验和标准手册》第38.3节是锂电芯和电池运输测试的基线证据；承运人和货代还可能要求测试概要、SDS、包装说明、荷电状态控制及标志/标签。
summary.zht: 運往埃及的鋰電芯和電池通常按國際危險貨物運輸規則處理。聯合國《試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節是鋰電芯和電池運輸測試的基線證據；承運人和貨代還可能要求測試概要、SDS、包裝說明、荷電狀態控制及標誌/標籤。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3
UN 3480 / UN 3481 lithium ion batteries or batteries contained in / packed with equipment, as applicable
Carrier, port, airline, IMDG, or IATA dangerous-goods documentation where applicable

summary.en: Chinese BESS export files often include UN 38.3 reports and dangerous-goods transport documentation alongside GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 technical reports. The China GB battery file does not replace the UN 38.3 transport file.
summary.zh: 中国BESS出口资料通常在GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023技术报告之外，还包括UN 38.3报告和危险货物运输文件。中国GB电池资料不能替代UN 38.3运输资料。
summary.zht: 中國BESS出口資料通常在GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023技術報告之外，還包括UN 38.3報告和危險貨物運輸文件。中國GB電池資料不能替代UN 38.3運輸資料。

gap.en: Confirm whether cells, modules, racks, or containerized assemblies ship as batteries, batteries packed with equipment, or batteries contained in equipment. Match the UN number, packing instruction, SOC limit, packaging test evidence, SDS, emergency contact, and test summary to the actual shipment configuration.
gap.zh: 应确认电芯、模组、电池架或集装箱组件按电池、与设备包装在一起的电池，还是设备内置电池运输。UN编号、包装说明、SOC限制、包装测试证据、SDS、应急联系人和测试概要必须与实际运输配置一致。
gap.zht: 應確認電芯、模組、電池架或集裝箱組件按電池、與設備包裝在一起的電池，還是設備內置電池運輸。UN編號、包裝說明、SOC限制、包裝測試證據、SDS、應急聯絡人和測試概要必須與實際運輸配置一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for international dangerous-goods transport where lithium battery transport rules apply; Egyptian import approval remains a separate question
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for lithium battery export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply; GB technical reports do not replace UN 38.3

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a transport gate, not an Egypt market-access approval. Keep the dangerous-goods shipment file separate from EOS / GOEIC, EgyptERA, fire-safety, and IEC technical evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是埃及市场准入批准。危险货物运输资料应与EOS/GOEIC、EgyptERA、消防安全和IEC技术证据分开管理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸門檻，不是埃及市場准入批准。危險貨物運輸資料應與EOS/GOEIC、EgyptERA、消防安全和IEC技術證據分開管理。
